voice_description: non-robotic male Russian voice, ~30 years old, warm, calm, friendly, confident, clear diction, medium pace, garden-mentor tone; identical voice across the whole 40s video; not robotic, not old, not theatrical
environment_core: realistic richly detailed cucumber bed / vegetable garden / greenhouse-edge with trellis, support net, twine, warm natural sunlight, rich soil, garden tools
topic_examples: Как получить больше огурцов без химии
Как правильно поливать огурцы в жару
Как ухаживать за огурцами в теплице
actions: shows cucumber leaves and tendrils on a trellis
touches support net and garden twine
gestures toward watering can and moist soil
shows cucumber flowers and fruit set
holds BIOGROWTH bottle in final scene
cta_styles: direct product recommendation with Telegram CTA

episode_structure.goal: Hook attention and promise a useful result.
Second practical advice with different action.
Third advice or a mistake to avoid.
Result, optional BIOGROWTH integration and CTA.
